name: Baked Ziti with Three Cheeses
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta following package directions; drain.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F.
3. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
4. In a large bowl, blend ricotta, 1 cup mozzarella, egg, parsley, garlic, pepper, and nutmeg; stir in ziti.
5. Spoon mixture into prepared casserole dish and sprinkle with remaining mozzarella and Parmesan.
6. Bake until top is golden, about 30 minutes. Makes 8 servings. (The way my family eats it does not make 8 servings!)
